summary: Tested NEW admin features on top of iter4: theme editing (7 color pickers + 3 presets) and promotions CRUD with public visibility toggle, plus ThemeInjector CSS !important override engine. 6/6 backend pytest pass and full Playwright UI flow passes. ThemeInjector verified to override hardcoded Tailwind arbitrary classes (e.g. text-[#1a5336] resolves to var(--color-primary) at runtime).
passed_tests: PUT /api/content with theme.primary=#ff0000 + accent=#00ff00 persists (verified via subsequent GET)
GET /api/content includes promotions array with 2 default banners (active=true, with image+title)
PUT /api/content updates promotions array (CRUD: add new, hide via active=false) and persists
POST /api/content/reset restores theme defaults AND 2 default promotions
Frontend / Hero h1 highlight 'retroexcavadora' computed color = rgb(245,197,24) = #F5C518
Frontend / #promociones section exists with h2 'Aprovecha nuestras ofertas del mes' and 2 promo-card-{id} testids
Frontend Tema tab: 7 data-testid color pickers (theme-primary-picker..theme-bgCream-picker) all rendered
Frontend Tema tab: 3 presets (Perrón, Construcción naranja, Verde clásico) — clicking Verde sets primary input to #1a5336

Frontend Tema tab: change primary to #ff0000 + Save → reload / → header logo (uses text-[#1a5336]) computed color = rgb(255,0,0). Confirms ThemeInjector !important CSS override engine works on hardcoded Tailwind arbitrary classes.
Frontend Promociones tab: 2 default rows with 'Título de la promoción' inputs. 'Agregar promoción' adds 3rd row.
Frontend Promociones tab: 'Visible en el sitio' checkbox toggle hides the promo from / (verified 2 visible cards after hiding 1 of 2 originals + adding 1 new active)
Persistencia: admin Save → reload / → cambios reflejados (theme + promotions)
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeInjector.jsx: clean implementation injecting :root CSS vars + !important rules for legacy hardcoded hex classes (#1a5336, #c9a961, etc). useMemo correctly recomputes only when theme changes.

PromotionsSection.jsx hardcodes #0a0a0a and #F5C518 in the section background and decorative stripes (style attribute, not via theme). If user changes bgDark/accent in theme, the promociones section will NOT follow. Minor — explicit black/yellow CAT branding may be intentional, but flag for awareness.

content_routes.py DEFAULT_CONTENT.company.name is now 'Perrón' (was 'Shíntergy' in iter4). The legacy /app/backend/tests/test_admin_cms.py asserts company.name=='Shíntergy' after reset; that test is now stale and will fail if re-run. Recommend updating the assertion or removing that line.
AdminDashboard 'Tema' Save button is shared with all tabs (admin-save) — works fine but no per-tab feedback. Minor UX.
AdminDashboard Promociones tab does not allow reordering (drag/drop). For 2-3 promos this is OK.

ThemeInjector escape function does not escape uppercase hex letters but Tailwind generates lowercase class names; F5C518 in JSX className must be exactly as written in CSS selector — verify case-sensitivity edge cases for accent (#F5C518 vs #f5c518). Currently working because no element uses bg-[#F5C518] dynamically; PromotionsSection uses inline style instead.
No rate-limit / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (carry-over from iter4).
test_credentials: Admin: Shintergyadmin / TOTP secret KHXP3AGX6ZQRL5UML6HZARPOUOCNBNIN (use pyotp.TOTP(secret).now()).
seed_data_creation: Test mutated theme.primary and promotions during testing; final teardown calls /api/content/reset to restore DEFAULT_CONTENT. No leftover test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter5 added /app/backend/tests/test_theme_promotions.py focused on theme + promotions only. iter4 test_admin_cms.py is mostly still valid except test_reset_content asserts company.name=='Shíntergy' which is now stale (default is 'Perrón'). data-testids added in iter5: theme-{primary,primaryDark,accent,accentDark,bgDark,bgLight,bgCream}-picker, promo-card-{id}, promotions-badge. Tab triggers use role=tab name='Tema / Colores' or 'Promociones'. ThemeInjector engine: it injects a <style> tag mapping legacy hardcoded hex Tailwind classes (e.g. .text-\[#1a5336\]) to var(--color-primary) with !important, so changing theme.primary visually rewrites the entire site without redeploy.
